column1: # ESP-IDF partition table (espflash.toml points here; offsets assume the
# N16R8 module's 16 MB flash). Adds `utzdata`: one dataset OUTSIDE the app
# image — flash-with-data.sh writes the tiny-static asset at its offset
# (keep that script's address in sync) and the firmware finds it by label
# at runtime (partition leg). Subtype stays `undefined`: custom subtypes
